sentences.arabic: تَتَجَلَّى فَلْسَفَةُ الضِّيَافَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ فِي أَبْهَى صُوَرِهَا حِينَ تَتَرَاصُّ الْمَوَائِدُ مُحَمَّلَةً بِأَطْيَبِ الثَّمَرَاتِ، مُعَبِّرَةً عَنْ سَخَاءٍ مَجْبُولٍ فِي الْهُوِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Filozofija arapskog gostoprimstva manifestuje se u svom najljepšem obliku kada se trpeze nižu opterećene najfinijim plodovima, izražavajući velikodušnost utkanu u sam identitet.
sentences.translationEn: The philosophy of Arab hospitality manifests in its most splendid form when tables are lined up laden with the finest fruits, expressing a generosity ingrained in the identity.

sentences.arabic: فَالْوَلِيمَةُ لَيْسَتْ مُجَرَّدَ اِسْتِيفَاءٍ لِحَاجَةٍ بَيُولُوجِيَّةٍ، بَلْ هِيَ طَقْسٌ أَنْثُرُوبُولُوجِيٌّ يُرَسِّخُ أَوَاصِرَ الْقُرْبَى وَيَمْحُو ضَغَائِنَ النُّفُوسِ.
sentences.translation: Gozba nije samo puko zadovoljavanje biološke potrebe, već antropološki ritual koji učvršćuje rodbinske veze i briše gorčinu iz duša.
sentences.translationEn: The feast is not merely the fulfillment of a biological need, but rather an anthropological ritual that strengthens kinship ties and erases grudges from the souls.

sentences.arabic: تَنْبَعِثُ رَوَائِحُ الْهَيْلِ وَالزَّعْفَرَانِ لِتَنْسِجَ هَالَةً مِنَ الْأُلْفَةِ، حَيْثُ يَمْتَزِجُ عَبِيرُ اللَّحْمِ الْمَنْضُوجِ بِبُخَارِ الْأَرُزِّ الْبَسْمَتِيِّ الطَّوِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Mirisi kardamoma i šafrana šire se kako bi istkali auru bliskosti, dok se aroma pečenog mesa miješa s parom dugozrnate basmati riže.
sentences.translationEn: Aromas of cardamom and saffron emanate to weave an aura of intimacy, where the scent of succulent meat mingles with the steam of long-grain basmati rice.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي تَحَلُّقِ الضُّيُوفِ حَوْلَ الصِّينِيَّةِ الْكُبْرَى، تَتَلَاشَى الْفَوَارِقُ الطَّبَقِيَّةُ أَمَامَ وَحْدَةِ الْمَأْكَلِ وَتَنَاغُمِ الْأَيْدِي الَّتِي تَقْتَسِمُ الرِّزْقَ.
sentences.translation: Dok se gosti okupljaju oko velike tepsije, klasne razlike nestaju pred jedinstvom hrane i harmonijom ruku koje dijele opskrbu.
sentences.translationEn: As guests gather around the large platter, class differences vanish before the unity of food and the harmony of hands sharing the sustenance.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذَا التَّدَفُّقَ الْحِسِّيَّ لِلنَّكَهَاتِ يُحِيلُ الطَّعامَ إِلَى لُغَةٍ صَامِتَةٍ، تَنْطِقُ بِتَارِيخٍ عَرِيقٍ مِنَ التَّبَادُلِ الثَّقَافِيِّ عَبْرَ طُرُقِ التَّوَابِلِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj čulni protok okusa pretvara hranu u nijemi jezik koji govori o drevnoj historiji kulturne razmjene putem puteva začina.
sentences.translationEn: This sensory flow of flavors transforms food into a silent language, speaking of an ancient history of cultural exchange across spice routes.

sentences.arabic: وَهَكَذَا، يَبْقَى الْمَطْبَخُ الْعَرَبِيُّ حِصْنًا لِلْمَوْرُوثِ، يَسْتَعْصِي عَلَى الذَّوَبَانِ فِي بَوْتَقَةِ الْعَوْلَمَةِ الْغِذَائِيَّةِ الْمُعَاصِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tako arapska kuhinja ostaje tvrđava naslijeđa, odupirući se topljenju u kotlu savremene prehrambene globalizacije.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, Arab cuisine remains a fortress of heritage, resisting dissolution in the melting pot of contemporary food globalization.
